title.text: Acknowledgment and Consent for Medical Treatment

options.value: I authorize the hospital to perform the necessary treatment or procedure on me.
I confirm that the doctors explained the procedure to me.
I authorize the procedure and understand the potential side effects.
I understand the risks and potential complications if I don't follow post-procedure instructions and attend follow-up appointments.
I acknowledge that all the information I provided in this form is true and accurate.
